domain_gate.hypothesis: amplitude dose law on the WEAK-TRANSPORT plant (qwen3), multi-seed confirm: dose ordering holds per-seed at 2 NEW independent-stream seeds {123,777} (+42 replayed), all points within budget. Two-plant dose-response replication remains OPEN.
